title: Hard Lattice Problems: SVP, CVP, and the Foundations of Security
description: Deep dive into the computational problems that make lattice-based cryptography secure. Understand SVP, CVP, their approximation variants, and why these problems resist quantum attacks.
learningObjectives: Define and distinguish SVP, CVP, SIVP, and their variants
Understand the complexity landscape of lattice problems
Explain approximation factors and their role in security
Analyze why no efficient quantum algorithms exist for these problems
Implement and visualize solutions to small lattice problems
Connect problem hardness to cryptographic security
